doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains fabricated provisions about non-lawyers and paralegals that do not appear in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which primarily addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers.
response_turn1:
